events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Verdict: **fail** — the staged conductor was sized to ampacity alone (Table 310.16) but not to the actual circuit length, producing excessive voltage drop. Recommended fix: recalculate load/length, re-select conductor from Table 310.16 with correct terminal temp rating and adjustment factors, then upsize until voltage drop is within the ~3%/5% guidance before any conductor is landed.
